title: Smelter's Pickaxe
description: A simple mod that adds an auto-smelting pickaxe!
body:
A simple mod that an Iron Pickaxe equivelant that automatically smelts mined blocks to the game!


![Crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/71c4c1cad076df64319c551b7512bd9a3a4b16e7.png)




First of a few projects I want to work on.
Any future updates or mod releases will be posted here: https://discord.gg/bAkqEuMW

If you have any ideas I'd love to hear them,! Let me know in either the comments of this post or in the discord linked above!
